name: Lakme Absolute Perfect Radiance Serum
description: A lightweight brightening serum with niacinamide that evens skin tone and adds a natural glow. Suits all skin types, absorbs fast without stickiness.
howToUse: Apply 2-3 drops on clean face morning and night. Follow with moisturiser and sunscreen in the day.

name: Dot & Key Vitamin C Face Wash
description: Gentle daily face wash with Vitamin C and papaya enzymes. Removes dirt and dullness without drying the skin.
ingredients: Vitamin C, Papaya Extract, Aloe Vera
howToUse: Massage a coin-sized amount on wet face for 30 seconds, rinse. Use twice daily.
